scripts.dev: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cd knotted-portal-master && npx wasm-pack build --target web && python3 -m http.server 3000
scripts.build: apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential && curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cd knotted-portal-master && npx wasm-pack build --target web
